author: runner-7
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9: a PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder completed by ops amendment before any final-phase run; no design field is touched). The in-flight f2b-transfer judge-2 diagnostic run (GPT-5.5 via global codex-cli 0.142.5, reasoning effort low) completed 360/360 items in-process (opus-run poc/f2b-transfer/opus-runs/20260709T232652Z/; the prior detached run had died at ~30/360 and was re-run robustly in a harness-monitored process, 0 no-label, 0 transport retries) and its per-judge raw response file data/d-adj-t/judge-2-responses.jsonl is now committed. This ops amendment resolves the 'PINNED-AT-INPUTS:filled-by-ops-amendment-when-the-in-flight-f2b-transfer-judge-2-run-completes-and-commits' placeholder in pins.artifact_hashes to that file's sha256. judge-2 is read here READ-ONLY as the DIAGNOSTIC + FAIL-direction stability gate ONLY (never gold); f2b-transfer's own single adjudication round is not consumed by this record. One-shot pin discipline: any change to those bytes before the final-phase run invalidates this value and requires a pre-run correction record, not a new ops amendment.
